overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves under an elevated highway structure, passing through intersections with heavy artificial lighting, digital billboards, and moderate vehicle traffic on wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered intersection under elevated highway with directional signage

events.description: white van drives past on the right side of the road
character begins crossing the street intersection
approaching the pink neon-lit section ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered intersection under the highway overpass, navigating between moving vehicles and crosswalk markings

notable_agents.action: white van driving past on the multi-lane road
person in light-colored clothing crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with support pillars spanning the intersection above
illuminated yellow directional signs with arrows pointing to City Center and other destinations
yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the wet pavement
building facade with purple and blue neon lighting visible through the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive elevated highway structure in a futuristic city at night. The camera moves through a covered intersection with yellow directional signage visible on the left, crossing wet pavement marked with crosswalk lines. A white van passes by on the right while a pedestrian crosses ahead, and the environment is dominated by greenish-blue neon lighting from the surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with overhead pink neon lighting and large digital billboards

events.description: entering the pink and purple neon-lit section under the canopy
large stacked digital billboard passes by closely on the right
exiting the pink neon section into darker blue-lit corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the pink neon-lit canopy, passing large digital advertisements and an oncoming pedestrian

notable_agents.action: person in uniform walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: overhead structure with bright pink and purple fluorescent tube lighting
tall vertical structure with multiple screens displaying advertisements including a smiling face graphic
low wall with orange and white coloring separating the sidewalk from a lower level

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a section dominated by vibrant pink and purple neon lighting from an overhead canopy. The camera passes a tall stacked digital billboard on the right displaying advertisements, while an orange concrete barrier runs along the right side of the walkway. A pedestrian in uniform walks toward the camera, and the lighting shifts dramatically from the previous greenish tones to warm pink hues before transitioning to cooler blue lighting at the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with blue street lighting

events.description: entering darker corridor with blue-white street lighting
subtle rightward curve in the walkway alignment

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk under the highway, passing blue street lamps and the long orange building facade

entered.detail: tall curved streetlight posts with blue-green illumination
long continuous wall with horizontal orange and white stripes running along the right side

segments.scene_description: This long segment features a continuous walk through a darker, more enclosed corridor under the elevated highway. The pink neon gives way to cooler blue street lighting on the left, while a long orange and white striped building facade runs along the right. The pavement remains wet and reflective, with vehicles visible moving on the road to the left. The environment feels more isolated and tunnel-like as the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signage

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into the open intersection area
approaching crosswalk with group of pedestrians waiting to cross

agents.ego_description: approaching the Skyline West intersection, preparing to cross the street with a group of pedestrians visible ahead

notable_agents.action: group of people standing at the crosswalk waiting for the traffic signal

entered.detail: blue illuminated street sign with white text reading 'Skyline West'
marked pedestrian crossing lines at the open intersection
illuminated traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens up as the camera exits the covered walkway into a more open intersection area. A blue 'Skyline West' street sign is visible on the left, and the camera approaches a crosswalk where a group of pedestrians waits. The traffic light shows red, and the environment transitions from the enclosed overpass corridor to an open street intersection with more visible sky and ambient city lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic city at night, moving from a neon-drenched overpass into a secluded corridor before emerging into an open urban intersection. It begins under a massive elevated highway, crossing wet pavement amidst greenish-blue neon lights and passing a white van and a pedestrian. As the camera advances, the lighting shifts dramatically to vibrant pink and purple hues beneath an overhead canopy, passing a stacked digital billboard and an orange concrete barrier. The scene then narrows into a darker, tunnel-like corridor where the pink glow gives way to cool blue street lighting and a long striped building facade. Finally, the enclosed space opens up as the camera exits the overpass, passing a Skyline West street sign to reach a bustling intersection where pedestrians wait at a red light under the ambient city sky.
